scripts.fix: bun run format:fix && bun run lint:fix
scripts.test:unit: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test bun test test/unit
scripts.test:integration: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test bun test test/integration
scripts.test:coverage: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm test bun test --coverage
scripts.test:e2e: docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml up -d --build --wait && bun test test/e2e; docker compose -f docker-compose.e2e.yml down
scripts.test:all: bun run test && bun run test:e2e
